description: Canonical unknown-domain routing example for the frozen OPL routed-action gateway.

payload.reason: The grant-planning semantics are recognizable, but no registered domain gateway currently owns grant_ops.

payload.request_summary: Build a formal grant proposal operating lane from the supplied topic brief.
payload.reason: The workstream semantics are clear, but OPL has no registered domain gateway for grant_ops yet.

governance_audit_record.summary: Routing is blocked because the requested workstream has no formally onboarded domain gateway.

boundary_notes: OPL does not assign the request to an existing domain just to keep the flow moving.
The absence of a registered domain owner is surfaced explicitly instead of being hidden behind best-effort routing.
